WEB_APP_DATA - Enum constant in enum class io.github.natanimn.telebof.enums.MessageType
Messages containing web app data, filtered by Filter.webAppData()

Filter messages contain WebAppData.

WRITE_ACCESS_ALLOWED - Enum constant in enum class io.github.natanimn.telebof.enums.MessageType
Service messages for write access allowed, filtered by Filter.writeAccessAllowed()
writeAccessAllowed() - Method in class io.github.natanimn.telebof.filters.Filter
Filter service messages for writing access allowed.
WriteAccessAllowed - Class in io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.media_and_service
This object represents a service message about a user allowing a bot to write messages after adding it to the attachment menu, launching a Web App from a link, or accepting an explicit request from a Web App sent by the method requestWriteAccess.
WriteAccessAllowed() - Constructor for class io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.media_and_service.WriteAccessAllowed
